top_signals.title: U.S. military launches strikes in retaliation for Iran downing helicopter
top_signals.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: After FCAS demise, Germany’s options include ordering more F-35 warplanes
top_signals.summary: “Knowing what we know today, we wouldn’t set up a program in this way again,” Pistorius said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after helicopter downed
top_signals.summary: The U.S. launched strikes against Iran on Tuesday after Trump said Tehran had shot down a U.S. Apache helicopter in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Guidance: AI Adoption Insights agreement
top_signals.summary: The AI Adoption Insights agreement was agreed as a part of the AI Adoption Summit, held on 8 June 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Self-proclaimed ‘messenger of God,’ six others arrested over confinement of teenager
top_signals.summary: The seven people, including a company executive, allegedly confined the executive's teenage son to a relative's house in Yokohama between May 6 and 8.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sigma Lithium wins appeal in Brazil, removing $10M legal order
top_signals.summary: The court win removes a potential obstacle to the company’s expansion plans at one of the largest hard-rock lithium projects in the Americas.
